context: Tests whether the agent investigates before force deleting, tries normal delete first, waits to confirm stuck state, checks finalizers, and validates recovery afterward.

checklist.name: Investigation first
checklist.description: Script includes kubectl describe or kubectl get pod -o yaml to investigate why pod is stuck

checklist.name: Finalizers checked
checklist.description: Uses kubectl get pod -o yaml | grep -A 10 finalizers or similar to check for blocking finalizers

checklist.name: Normal delete first
checklist.description: Script attempts kubectl delete pod (without --force) before escalating

checklist.name: Watch and wait
checklist.description: Includes kubectl get pod -w or documents waiting 60+ seconds to confirm pod is truly stuck

checklist.name: Force as last resort
checklist.description: Documentation explicitly states force delete should only happen after confirming stuck state

checklist.name: Post-deletion validation
checklist.description: Script verifies pod is gone with kubectl get pod after force delete

checklist.name: Deployment status check
checklist.description: Checks deployment rollout status or new pod creation after removing stuck pod

checklist.name: No immediate force
checklist.description: Does NOT use force delete as the first action without investigation
